name: CommandBar
description: CommandBar — User experience platform with in-app nudges, spotlight search, HelpHub, and copilot for product onboarding.

seo.title: CommandBar — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: CommandBar: CommandBar — User experience platform with in-app nudges, spotlight search, HelpHub, and copilot for product onboarding.

when_to_use: Spotlight search + in-app nudge SDK for complex SaaS product onboarding
Contextual HelpHub delivering documentation inside the product UI
AI copilot layer embedded in product for guided user workflows
Reducing support volume with in-product self-serve guidance and nudges

pros: Spotlight search drives deep product discoverability
HelpHub consolidates docs, videos, and support
Copilot adds AI guidance inside the app
Pairs nudges with command palette elegantly
cons: Pitch broadened — feels like scope creep
Enterprise pricing that is not transparent
Weaker for simple tooltip or checklist use cases
review.verdict: Compelling when command palette plus AI help is the bet; overengineered if you just need tooltips.
review.best_for: Complex B2B apps where users get lost navigating deep features
review.not_for: Simple SaaS needing basic onboarding tours
